title: Update model scout to text-only with descriptions

log.context: Update model scout to text-only with descriptions

Done. Here's what changed:

**`activities/scout_local.py`**
- Added `_is_text_only()` — checks `pipeline_tag`, HF `tags` list, together.ai `type` field, and name/ID patterns to detect and exclude vision, image gen, audio, TTS, ASR, multimodal, embedding, and reranking models
- `filter_candidates` now calls `_is_text_only()` and skips anything that fails it, with a debug log

**`activities/scout_db.py`**
- Added `unique_description TEXT` column to the schema
